# PERF-167 positive: wg.Add called inside a goroutine body
lang: go
file: PERF-167-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "sync"

func FanOut(work []int) {
	var wg sync.WaitGroup
	for _, item := range work {
		go func() {
			wg.Add(1)
			defer wg.Done()
			process(item)
		}()
	}
	wg.Wait()
}

func process(n int) { _ = n }
